ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number assigned by the police department */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the incident */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block where the incident occurred */,
  "iucr_code" INTEGER /* IUCR (Illinois Uniform Crime Reporting) code */,
  "primary_type" TEXT /* Primary type of crime (e.g., CRIMINAL DAMAGE, BATTERY) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Location description (e.g., STREET, APARTMENT) */,
  "arrest" INTEGER /* Indicates if an arrest was made (True/False) */,
  "domestic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the crime was domestic (True/False) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the incident occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the incident location */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community area where the incident occurred */,
  "census_tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census tract where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the incident */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect involved in the incident */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim involved in the incident */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Details of evidence collected during the incident */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of how the incident was resolved */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up actions are required (True/False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_census_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_tract_id") REFERENCES census_tracts ("census_tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_iucr_code FOREIGN KEY ("iucr_code") REFERENCES iucr_codes ("iucr_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area */,
  "community_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the community area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community area */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the community area */,
  "area_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the area manager */,
  "emergency_services" TEXT /* Details of emergency services available in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_tracts" (
  "census_tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census tract */,
  "census_tract_name" TEXT /* Name of the census tract */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the census tract */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the census tract */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the census tract */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the census tract */,
  "public_services" TEXT /* Details of public services available in the tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iucr_codes" (
  "iucr_code" INTEGER /* IUCR code for the crime */,
  "iucr_description" TEXT /* Description of the IUCR code */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "legal_consequences" TEXT /* Typical legal consequences for the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iucr_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active (True/False) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
